lint.notes: All warnings are from node_modules dependencies, not from project source code

notes: The typescript milestone consists of library implementation features (typescript-package-structure and typescript-quantization) that do not have associated validation contract assertions. The features have been verified through: (1) All 58 unit tests passing, (2) TypeScript type checking passing, (3) Linting passing (warnings only in dependencies), (4) CLI built and functional with version 0.1.0. No flow validators were spawned as there are no user-facing contract assertions to validate for this milestone.
